sql.if:
AND
BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
USER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
(BOARD_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR BOARD_CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

mapper.select: SELECT B.* , U.USER_NAME, P.* FROM BOARD B LEFT JOIN LOG_GG_USER U ON B.USER_NO = U.USER_NO LEFT JOIN PARTY_RECRUIT P ON B.BOARD_NO = P.BOARD_NO WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND BOARD_CD = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD ( BOARD_NO,USER_NO,CATEGORY_NO, GAME_CODE, BOARD_CONTENT,BOARD_TITLE, POST_DATE,BOARD_CD,READ_COUNT) VALUES ( #{boardNo},#{userNo},#{categoryNo}, #{gameCode}, #{boardContent},#{boardTitle}, DEFAULT,DEFAULT,DEFAULT)
mapper.select: SELECT R.*, U.USER_NAME FROM REPLY R JOIN LOG_GG_USER U ON R.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} AND STATUS = 'Y' ORDER BY NVL(PARENT_REPLY_NO, REPLY_NO) ASC, REPLY_DATE ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE BOARD SET READ_COUNT = READ_COUNT + 1 WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
UPDATE BOARD SET BOARD_CD = 'N' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
UPDATE REPLY SET STATUS = 'N' WHERE REPLY_NO = #{replyNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REPORT ( REPORT_NO, USER_NO, BOARD_NO, REPLY_NO, REPORT_CONTENT, REPORT_TYPE, STATUS ) VALUES ( SEQ_REPORT_NO.NEXTVAL, #{userNo}, #{boardNo},#{replyNo}, #{reportContent}, #{reportType}, DEFAULT )
mapper.select: SELECT R.*, U.USER_NAME FROM REPORT R JOIN LOG_GG_USER U ON R.USER_NO = U.USER_NO ORDER BY REPORT_NO DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE REPORT SET STATUS = 'Y', DONE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REPORT_NO = #{reportNo}
mapper.select: SELECT NOTICE_NO, TITLE, POST_DATE FROM NOTICE ORDER BY NOTICE_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTICE ( NOTICE_NO,TITLE, NOTICE_CONTENT,POST_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_NOTICE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{title},#{noticeContent},SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO PATCHNOTE ( PATCHNOTE_NO, GAME_CODE, TITLE, PATCHNOTE_CONTENT,POST_DATE ) VALUES ( SEQ_PATCHNOTE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{gameCode}, #{title}, #{patchnoteContent},SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT BOARD_NO, BOARD_TITLE, REASON, POST_DATE, ANSWER_STATUS FROM INQUIRY WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} ORDER BY BOARD_NO DESC
SELECT * FROM INQUIRY ORDER BY CASE WHEN ANSWER_STATUS = 'W' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, POST_DATE ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_INQUIRY_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO INQUIRY ( BOARD_NO, USER_NO, USER_NAME, BOARD_TITLE, BOARD_CONTENT, REASON, POST_DATE,ANSWER_STATUS, ANSWER ) VALUES ( #{boardNo}, #{userNo}, #{userName}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardContent}, #{reason}, SYSDATE, DEFAULT, DEFAULT )
mapper.update: UPDATE INQUIRY SET ANSWER = #{answer}, ANSWER_STATUS = 'C' WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM BOARD_LIKES WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND BOARD_NO = #{boardNo}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPLY_LIKES WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo} AND REPLY_NO = #{replyNo}
